$comment: Expected canonical post-migration state for docs/save_compat/manifest.json's b3-lua-versioned baseline's lua-unit-ai-v1 fixture (issue #766). The tracked .bin is a REAL v1-shaped unit_ai payload -- bare-number reference fields, no __owner -- encoded through the genuine scripts/lib/data_codec.lua M.encode (via a real HsLua VM, not a hand-rolled reimplementation of the wire format; see Test.Headless.Lua.SaveModules's 'tracked v1 fixtures from disk' describe block for the generation chunk and the real saveModules.prepareLoad/applyAll round trip this checks it against).
